mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, specification, unit, unit_price, stock_quantity, status FROM medicines
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicines (code, name, specification, unit, unit_price, stock_quantity, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{stockQuantity}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE medicines SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE medicines SET status = 'DISABLED' WHERE id = #{id}
